executives.name: Galen McNamara
executives.background: Mr. McNamara is an entrepreneur and geoscientist with over 15 years of experience. He is the co-founder and CEO of Summa Silver Corp. and was previously the Senior Project Geologist at NexGen Energy Ltd.
